description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a prominent stock and a long barrel, suggesting a focus on stability and accuracy. The body is primarily tan with red and gray accents, and it includes a visible magazine well and a bipod for steady aiming. The stock is thick and fixed, providing solid shoulder support, while the grip and trigger area are ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The top of the rifle is equipped with a scope, indicating it is intended for precision shooting at distance. The barrel is long and slender, ending with a small muzzle device. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, typical for modern tactical rifles.
description: A tan, red, and gray precision rifle with a fixed stock, long barrel, scope, and bipod, designed for stability and accuracy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, bipod legs, and the symmetrical alignment of the stock and scope.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long barrel, fixed stock, scope, bipod, and the magazine well beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the thick stock, grip, and the alignment of the scope along the top rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the bipod and magazine well.
